_publications._publicationTitle: COMT Val(158)Met Polymorphism Is Associated with Verbal Working Memory in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: Our preliminary results support an advantageous working memory performance in NF1 Met/Met carriers, which strengthens the hypothesis of genetic variants accounting for phenotypic variability in NF1
details: Successfully used for COMT Val158Met genotyping in NF1 patients, enabling identification of genotype effects on working memory performance
